content: Jeff Sackmann tennis_atp is the correct primary ATP source but has caveats: rankings are mostly complete only from 1985 onward with gaps earlier; ranking/age fields are as of tourney_date, usually Monday of tournament week; MatchStats are generally tour-level 1991-present and missing for some matches; stats are integer totals, not percentages; files include non-v1 scopes such as doubles, qualifiers, challengers, futures, and Davis Cup that must be filtered for ATP singles v1 constraints.
